title: Hiring Production Engineer at Nocil South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Nocil South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Nocil South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil South Asia Partners:
Nocil South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
